headline: Can BMY's Growth Portfolio Counter Legacy Drugs Decline in Q1?
summary: BMY pivots to growth portfolio as legacy drugs decline, with rising new therapies helping offset revenue erosion and reshape the long-term outlook.

headline: Eli Lilly Snags $7 Billion Cancer Deal To Rival Gilead, J&J, Others
summary: Eli Lilly said Monday it will spend up to $7 billion to buy privately held Kelonia Therapeutics for its suite of cancer treatments.

headline: BMY Stock: Analysts See 16% Upside and a Strong Buy
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) trades at $60.17 as of writing. The 24/7 Wall St. Price Target is $70.12, implying upside of 16.51% over the next 12 months. headline: TD Cowen Initiates on MapLight (MPLT); Says It’s Undervalued on Schizophrenia Alone
summary: MapLight Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPLT) is one of the must-buy small cap stocks to buy. On April 7, TD Cowen analyst Joseph Thome initiated coverage on MapLight Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPLT) with a Buy rating. The analyst cited the company’s pipeline of treatments targeting the central nervous system, or CNS, and neuropsychiatric conditions. Thome’s bullish thesis is […]

headline: Ardelyx Appoints Biopharmaceutical Veteran, Felecia W. Ettenberg, as Chief Legal Officer
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ardelyx, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARDX), a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of innovative medicines that meet significant unmet medical needs, today announced the appointment of Felecia W. Ettenberg, a seasoned leader with more than 25 years of legal experience in the biopharmaceutical industry, as Chief Legal Officer (CLO). She will oversee Ardelyx’s legal, compliance, regulatory, and government affairs operations

raw.headline: Ardelyx Appoints Biopharmaceutical Veteran, Felecia W. Ettenberg, as Chief Legal Officer
raw.summary: WALTHAM, Mass., April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ardelyx, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARDX), a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of innovative medicines that meet significant unmet medical needs, today announced the appointment of Felecia W. Ettenberg, a seasoned leader with more than 25 years of legal experience in the biopharmaceutical industry, as Chief Legal Officer (CLO). She will oversee Ardelyx’s legal, compliance, regulatory, and government affairs operations
